message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013, Pre- and Post-election Campaign Panel (GLES 2013 Campaign Panel)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12125","justification":"Includes detailed political behaviour and attitudes around the 2013 federal election, with regional identifiers that allow analysis of respondents in Saarland during the 2010s."},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2009–2013–2017 Multi-Level Post-Election Cross-Section (GLES Cross-Section)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12662","justification":"National election study with political attitudes, vote choice, and socio-demographics; federal state information can be used to focus on Saarland for elections in the early–mid 2010s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behaviour in Germany 2014 (ALLBUS/GGSS 2014)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12194","justification":"ALLBUS 2014 covers political attitudes and participation in Germany, including regional information that enables isolating Saarland respondents in the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behaviour in Germany 2016 (ALLBUS/GGSS 2016)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12818","justification":"Provides data on political behaviour and attitudes in 2016; state-level identifiers allow analysis of citizens in Saarland during the 2010s."},{"title":"Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behaviour in Germany 2018 (ALLBUS/GGSS 2018)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13271","justification":"National survey of political attitudes and participation; respondents can be filtered to Saarland to study late‑2010s political behaviour."},{"title":"European Election Study 2014 – Voter Study, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12208","justification":"Contains German voters’ behaviour and attitudes for the 2014 European Parliament election; region variables can be used to focus on Saarland during the 2010s."},{"title":"European Election Study 2019 – Voter Study, Germany","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13542","justification":"Includes political attitudes and vote choice for the 2019 European election; enables analysis of Saarland voters in the late 2010s via regional identifiers."},{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 2013 – German National Election Study (GLES) Rolling Cross-Section","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12118","justification":"Rolling cross‑section around the 2013 Bundestag election with rich measures of political behaviour and attitudes; federal state codes allow selection of Saarland."},{"title":"Bundestag Election Study 2017 – GLES Cross-Section Pre-Election Survey","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12927","justification":"Pre‑election survey for the 2017 federal election covering political preferences and participation; can be subset to Saarland respondents for analyses in the late 2010s."},{"title":"State Election Study Saarland 2012 (Landtagswahlstudie Saarland 2012)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11603","justification":"Specifically focused on the 2012 Saarland state election with detailed political behaviour and attitude measures directly targeting the Saarland electorate in the 2010s."}]}
